pauseReason.SUPERSEDED_BY_QUOTE: Quote sent — new sequence took over

page.title: Follow-up email sequences
page.intro: VAiyu sends these emails automatically on the schedule below — pause via Lead detail or disable a rule here. Drips auto-pause when a lead moves to Qualified / Won / Converted, and cancel on Lost.
page.channelNote: Email channel only for v1. WhatsApp opens after Meta template approval. Daily send cap defaults to 200/hotel — adjust in hotel settings if needed.
page.noRules: No drip rules. (Stock rules are seeded on hotel creation — this shouldn't be empty.)

trigger.LEAD_CREATED: Fires when a new lead is created
trigger.LEAD_QUOTED: Fires when a lead reaches QUOTED
trigger.WALKIN_LOST: Fires when a walk-in lead is marked LOST
